— What We Do

Cooling. Repaired. Properly.

Radiator Repairs

Leaks, cracks, blocked cores — diagnosed and fixed with pressure-testing and proven repairs that last.

Complete Installations

New radiators sourced and fitted for cars, 4WDs, trucks and farm machinery. Right part, fitted right.

Air Con Regas & Service

Cold-as-ice A/C regas, compressor replacement and full system servicing for any make or model.

Cooling System Service

Coolant flushes, thermostat checks, hose replacement — keep your engine running cool through the Tamworth summer.

— Who We Are

A Family Workshop. Decades of Trade.

Clegg's & Hardy's has been keeping Tamworth's engines cool for generations. Chris and the team handle every job personally — from a quick regas on the family car to a full radiator rebuild on a working truck. No call-centres, no upsells, no guesswork.

  • Fast, reliable service booked around your schedule
  • Free, honest quotes — no obligation
  • Every job pressure-tested before it leaves
  • Country prices, city-grade workmanship
